# Recurring Documents Module

Module ID: recurring-documents
Status: draft
Purpose: Recurring invoice and bill templates with due-cycle generation.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/recurring-documents check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/recurring-documents build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/recurring-documents test
